steps.title: This protocol performs an AlphaLISA [Perkin Elmer AlphaLISA](https://resources
steps.instruction: This protocol performs an AlphaLISA [Perkin Elmer AlphaLISA](https://resources.perkinelmer.com/lab-solutions/resources/docs/GDE_Quick_AlphaLISA_conversion.pdf) based on the attached experimental protocol with user determined parameters (described below). ---

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 8 uL sample serial dilution from slot 3 A1-A12 to slot 1 A1-A12.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 8 uL sample serial dilution from slot 3 A1-A12 to slot 1 B1-B12.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 8 uL sample serial dilution from slot 3 A1-A12 to slot 1 A13-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 8 uL sample serial dilution from slot 3 A1-A12 to slot 1 B13-B24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL ligand 1 from slot 5 A1 to slot 1 A1-A24, then B1-B24. Similarly, use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL ligand 2 to the plate in slot 2.

steps.title: Pause and wait for user to resume
steps.instruction: Pause and wait for user to resume.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL anti-ligand from slot 6 A1 to slot 1 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL anti-ligand from slot 6 A1 to slot 1 B1-B24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL anti-ligand from slot 6 A2 to slot 2 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL anti-ligand from slot 6 A2 to slot 2 B1-B24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL acceptor from slot 6 A3 to slot 1 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL acceptor from slot 6 A3 to slot 1 B1-B24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL acceptor from slot 6 A4 to slot 2 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL acceptor from slot 6 A4 to slot 2 B1-B24.

steps.title: Pause and wait for user to resume
steps.instruction: Pause and wait for user to resume.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL donor from slot 6 A5 to slot 1 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL donor from slot 6 A5 to slot 1 B1-B24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL donor from slot 6 A6 to slot 2 A1-A24.

steps.title: Use the p20 multi to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use the p20 multi to transfer 4 uL donor from slot 6 A6 to slot 2 B1-B24.
